sections.sectionTitle: Galte in Gamsung Siasak: ' Hotkhiat ding Ngetna

verses.text: Pasian aw, bang hangin kote hong paiikhia paisuak na hi hiam? Bang hangin na gamsunga om nangma tuute tungah heh na hi hiam
Tanglai-in na ngahsa na mihonte, nangma luah minam dingin na tatkhiatsate phawk in! Na ten'nasa Zion Mual hong phawk in
A sia densa munah hong pai in. Na biakinn sunga om khempeuh galte in susia khinta hi
Nangma galte mun siangtho laizangah awng uh a, amau' dialte gualzawhna lim dingin a khai uh hi
Amaute pen tulak sing phatna-ah pai-in heipi tawh sing a phuk bang uh hi
Tua ciangin biakinn na a kizemte khempeuh sek-hei leh sekpi tawh a satkham uh hi
Amaute in mei tawh na biakinn hal uh a, nangmah hong kibiakna mun a susia uh hi
Amaute in, “A vekpi-in zo mang khin ni,” kici uh a, gamsung tenga om Pasian biakna inn khempeuh mei tawh a hal uh hi
Kote in ka mailam thu ding uh ka thei kei uh hi. Kamsang khat zong om nawnlo a, bang tanvei hi ding, ci-in a thei kuamah ka om kei uh hi
Pasian aw, ka galte in bang tanvei hong thusim loin om ding ahi hiam? Langpangte in nangma min hong simmawh den ding ahi uh hiam
Bang hangin na khut dokkik a, na khut taklam na ang-ah koihcip na hi hiam
Ahi zongin Pasian pen tanglai peka kipanin kumpi hi tawntung a, hih leitungah a hong honkhia zelzel ngei ka Kumpi ahi hi
Na vangliatna tawh tuipi na khenkham a, tuite tunga gulpite' lutangte na sukham hi
Nangmah in Awle' lutangte na sukham a, amah pen, gamlak ganhingte' nek dingin na pia hi
Ciktuite leh luite na phulsak a, guntui luangte na kangsak hi
Sun pen nangma-a' hi a, zan zong nangma-a' mah ahi hi. Nangmah in ni leh kha na bawl hi
Leitung gamgi khempeuhte leh phalbi hun leh khuakhal hunte na bawl khin hi
Topa aw, galte in nang hong thusimlohna leh, dawibia mite in nangma min a hong simmawhna hong phawk ta in
A cimawh mite a gal gilote uh khutsungah nusia kei in la, bawlsiatna a thuak mite mangngilh kei in
Nangma thuciamna hong pi ngaihsut in; bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mun mialna khempeuh mi ngongtatte tawh kidim hi
A kisikcip mite zahhuaisak kei in la, mizawng leh mi cimawhte nangma min kiphatsak in
Pasian aw, tho in la, nangma thu-ah hong pang in. Dawibia mite in sun tawntungin nang a hong thusimlohna hong phawk ta in
Nangma galte' kikona aw, nang a hong langpangte a gamlum semsemna mangngilh kei ta in.
